candidate.name: Coolant distribution and facility-side thermal chain
candidate.description: Facility-side coolant distribution, heat rejection, fluid management, and thermal-chain execution for liquid-cooled AI infrastructure.
notes: This layer combines hardware scale, commissioning, and ongoing fluid-management execution.
The need for end-to-end thermal-chain deployment looks increasingly like the primary bottleneck.

score.candidate_name: Coolant distribution and facility-side thermal chain
score.explanation: Coolant distribution and facility-side thermal chain scores 88.8/100 (critical) as a chokepoint candidate. The strongest weighted drivers are supplier concentration, qualification friction, demand acceleration. The least supportive signals are pricing power evidence, geopolitical exposure. This score should be treated as a ranking aid, not as a trading decision on its own.

candidate.name: Direct-to-chip liquid cooling rack integration
candidate.description: Direct-to-chip liquid cooling deployment, rack integration, and liquid-cooled AI system architecture.
notes: Rack-level liquid cooling is becoming standard for the highest-density AI systems.
This layer is critical, but the scaling gate may still sit slightly further downstream in facility thermal-chain execution.

score.explanation: Direct-to-chip liquid cooling rack integration scores 87.2/100 (critical) as a chokepoint candidate. The strongest weighted drivers are supplier concentration, demand acceleration, qualification friction. The least supportive signals are pricing power evidence, geopolitical exposure. This score should be treated as a ranking aid, not as a trading decision on its own.

candidate.name: Chip-level thermal interfaces and cold plates
candidate.description: Chip-level thermal interfaces, cold plates, and related component innovations needed for high-density AI cooling.
notes: This layer is technologically important, but current evidence does not yet show it as the single tightest bottleneck.
The stronger deployment gate appears to sit at scalable thermal-chain integration.
